attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.REV_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.SO_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.BATCH_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.PROJECT_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.PROJ_CUSTOMER_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.SERVICE_PRG_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.QUOTE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.AGREEMENT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.FUNDING_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.ALLOCATED_REV_AMT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.LOCK_MODE, coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.AGREEMENT_FLAG,'U'), coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.FUNDING_FLAG,'U'), coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.BASELINE_FLAG,'U'), coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.BILL_EVENT_FLAG,'U'), coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.REV_EVENT_FLAG,'U'), STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.DELETED_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.DELETED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.DELETED_SOURCE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.CONC_REQ_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.SOURCE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.COST_BUDGET, coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.COST_BUD_FLAG,'U'), STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, coalesce(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.BASELINE_COSTBUD_FLAG,'U'), STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.PARENT_REV_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.ALLOCATED_QTY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.MEMO_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.ESTIMATE_FMV_NUM, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST,
 (
 select REV_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME  from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST
 minus
 select REV_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME  from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.REV_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.REV_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DISTRBTN)
